About: It is about the Battle of Waterloo.
AssociatedWith: It is associated with Simulations Publications, Inc. (SPI).
It is associated with Decision Games.
ConsistsOf: It consists of counters.
It consists of a map.
It consists of rules.
It consists of a rulebook.
It consists of Combat Strength Marker Sheets.
It consists of a paper hex map in four sections.
It consists of a plastic six-sided die.
It consists of plastic trays for holding counters.
It consists of a Color Battle Analysis.
It consists of Player Aid Sheets.
DevelopedBy: It was developed by Frank Davis.
HasA: It has a large number of counters.
It has a 68" x 44" map.
It has 2000 counters.
It has rules for battle formation tactics.
It has rules for skirmishers.
It has rules for artillerists.
It has 5 sheets of counters.
It has 2 Combat Strength Marker Sheets.
It has a 68" x 44" paper hex map in four sections.
It has 6 six-sided dice.
HasFeatureOf: It is characterized as a "monster game" because of its large number of counters.
It is characterized as a battalion-level simulation.
IsA: It is a board wargame simulation.
It is a two-person or three-person tabletop game.
ProducedBy: It was produced by Decision Games.
PublishedAs: It was published as a board wargame simulation.
It was published as a "monster game".
It was published as a battalion-level simulation.
It was published as a streamlined game.
PublishedBy: It was published by Simulations Publications, Inc. (SPI).
It was published by Decision Games.
PublishedIn: It was published in a flat box.
It was published in a standard-sized "bookcase" box.
UsedFor: It is used for battle formation tactics.
